title: Verify loss aversion warning displays when cancelling trial
description: Test that clicking cancel triggers the Loss Aversion Exit Gate with warning about losing remaining free days
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Manage Trial section

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
3. Click 'Cancel Trial' in Manage Trial section

expected_result: Loss Aversion Exit Gate appears with headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body stating user will lose remaining days, with 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action and 'Cancel Anyway' as secondary action
